top_signals.title: Trump says Iran wants to meet as U.S. fires more strikes; analysts warn of 'forever war' risk
top_signals.summary: Fighting in the Middle East has intensified in recent days, but could escalate further if Iran fails to cooperate, President Donald Trump said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Pressure mounts on US defense executives to boost weapons production
top_signals.summary: Defense executives face pressure to boost production as prolonged conflicts have consumed large quantities of missiles, interceptors and other weapons.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump administration unveils AI-supported clearinghouse for cyber vulnerabilities
top_signals.summary: The Gold Eagle program will allowe industry, critical infrastructure operators and the government to use artificial intelligence to rapidly detect, prioritize and patch cybersecurity vulnerabilities, officials said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Pound Index Hits One-Year High on Mahmood for Chancellor Reports
top_signals.summary: A measure of sterling’s strength rose to its highest level in a year on Wednesday following reports that incoming UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham will name Shabana Mahmood as his Chancellor of the Exchequer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Statutory guidance: Reference Documents for The Customs Tariff (Suspension of Import Duty Rates) (EU Exit) Regulations 2020
top_signals.summary: Find out about the tariff suspensions that apply from the end of the transition period.

top_signals.title: Adani Flagship Draws Mutual Fund Interest as Governance Risks Recede
top_signals.summary: Local mutual funds bought Adani Enterprises shares worth 46.60 billion rupees last month.

top_signals.title: Cooling Inflation, Surging Bank Earnings Power Stocks - WSJ
top_signals.summary: Cooling Inflation, Surging Bank Earnings Power Stocks  WSJ
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Williams Grand Prix Technologies Launches Superyacht Battery System
top_signals.summary: Williams Grand Prix Technologies has entered the marine sector with the launch of the ES10M, a battery system developed for superyachts, support and explorer vessels, hybrid propulsion applications, and refit programs. The launch marks the company's first dedicated marine product.Based in Grove…
